help.howToPlay: Choose numbers from the path by rule — even, odd, multiples, skip-counting, or sequences — then tap "Check Path". Order matters for skip and sequences.
help.scoring: Correct on first try +30, second +20, third +10. After 3 mistakes the correct path is shown.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many of the 20 tasks you completed, accuracy, streaks, and finishing the path.
help.tip: Pay attention to whether order matters - for skip-counting and sequences you need to choose in order.
